background_setting: A wide field covered in autumn leaves sits before tall deciduous trees. The low sun warms the ground and throws long shadows between the leaf clusters.

context: The scene focuses on the quiet motion of autumn leaves moving across a sunlit field under a light breeze.

actions.description: A wide view establishes the golden leaf field and distant deciduous trees.
The breeze lifts scattered leaves, making amber and red shapes swirl low across the ground.
The camera glides through drifting leaves as the low sun glows behind the tree line.
